sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111362" key="filopai/kths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλοπαίκτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n111362.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">φιλοπαίγμων</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:75:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">75.6</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:5:161" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.161</biblScope> </bibl>; also <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φιλοπαίστης</orth>, ibid.</sense> </entryFree>
